title: Add Internationalization (i18n) to a Next.js App
description: Add multi-language support to an existing Next.js App Router project using next-intl: configure routing, wrap layouts, extract strings into message files, add a locale switcher, and deploy.

steps.description: Install next-intl, create locale message files (en.json, etc.), configure next.config, add middleware for locale detection, and wrap the root layout with NextIntlClientProvider
Ensure linting catches missing translation keys (eslint-plugin-i18n-json or similar) and TypeScript types for message keys are generated
Add unit tests for locale-switching logic and verify translated strings render correctly with mocked messages
Add E2E tests that navigate to each locale route and assert locale-specific text appears
Add a CI step to validate all locale message files have the same keys (no missing translations)
Deploy to Vercel — verify locale-based routing works in production and hreflang tags are present for SEO
